subcodes.first_line: O Mir Qabl-i-Hashim! The Most Great News hath appeared, and the Lord of Pre-existence doth summon the peoples unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا میر قبل هاشم قد ظهر النبا الاعظم و مالک القدم بین الامم و یدعوهم الی
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
